---
name: Bug report
about: Something is not working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: presdec
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open...
2. Click...
3. See error...

## Expected behaviour

What should have happened.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the app.

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **App version:** <!-- e.g. v0.2.8 — shown in the title bar -->
- **Installation method:** <!-- Installer / AppImage / deb / built from source -->

## Files (optional)

If relevant, attach a sanitised (no real personal data) Excel workbook or Word template that reproduces the issue.

## Additional context

Any other detail, screenshots, or log output that might help.
